notes: NES version is a side-scrolling action platformer developed by Data East. Wikipedia source contains no documented audio/music parameters including tempo, keys, chord progressions, SFX characteristics, or area-specific musical data. The arcade version composers Tatsuya Kiuchi and Tomoyoshi Sato are listed, but no music documentation for the NES port specifically. GamePro review mentions 'mediocre sound' for Game Gear version but provides no technical specifications.
